chapter_title.ar: بَابُ عَرْضِ الْأَعْمَالِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The deeds are presented to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/ 3)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ مَا لَكُمْ تَسُوءُونَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ رَجُلٌ كَيْفَ نَسُوؤُهُ فَقَالَ أَ مَا تَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّ أَعْمَالَكُمْ تُعْرَضُ عَلَيْهِ فَإِذَا رَأَى فِيهَا مَعْصِيَةً سَاءَهُ ذَلِكَ فَلَا تَسُوءُوا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَ سُرُّوهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘What is the matter with you all, upsetting Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>?’ So the man said, ‘How are we upsetting him<sup>saww</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But, are you not knowing that your deeds are presented to him<sup>saww</sup>? So when he<sup>saww</sup> sees your deeds wherein is disobedience, that upsets him<sup>saww</sup>. So do not upset Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> and (instead) cheer him<sup>saww</sup> up’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Uthman ibn ’Isa from Suma‘ who has said that he heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say the following. “What is wrong with you? Why do you disappoint the Messenger of Allah?” A man asked, “How do we disappoint him?” The Imams (a.s.) said, “Do you not know that your deeds are presented before him? When he find sins in them it disappoints him. Do not disappoint the Messenger of Allah. Do things that will make him happy.”
